task: pick rxbar chocolate from middle drawer and place on counter
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A nightstand with a bowl, an orange, and a can on the top surface. A drawer is open, containing a green energy drink can and a black RXBAR chocolate bar. The RXBAR is a small, rectangular object. STRATEGY - First, reach into the drawer to grasp the RXBAR. Then, transport it to the nightstand surface and place it there. Failure modes include not grasping the RXBAR, dropping it during transport, or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach into the drawer to access the RXBAR; Step 2 grasp the RXBAR for secure hold; Step 3 transport it to the nightstand surface; Step 4 place it on the surface.

Goal: on(RXBAR, nightstand); stable(RXBAR)
Scene: nightstand, bowl, orange, can, drawer, RXBAR
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the open area of the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: inside(gripper, drawer) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(gripper, drawer)
Step 2: grasp(RXBAR)
  affordance_region: the body of the black RXBAR chocolate bar
  contact: holding(RXBAR) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(RXBAR)
Step 3: transport(RXBAR -> nightstand)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the nightstand surface
  spatial: above(RXBAR, nightstand, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(RXBAR)
  done_when: above(RXBAR, nightstand, 0.05)
Step 4: place(RXBAR -> nightstand)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the nightstand surface
  contact: surface_contact(RXBAR, nightstand) [completion]; released(RXBAR) [completion]
  pose: stable(RXBAR) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(RXBAR, nightstand) AND released(RXBAR)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the open area of the drawer
the body of the black RXBAR chocolate bar
an empty area on the nightstand surface
an empty area on the nightstand surface
